metaData.Key Information: Fortune Japanese Silken Tofu has a softer texture than regular tofu and is ideal for soup or a steamed tofu dish. It is also 25% higher in calcium compared to regular tofu. This healthier choice product has all the additional nutrients of omega 3 extracts from vegetable sources.
